canonical_question: How do I run 20-40 customer discovery interviews — scripts, synthesis, constraint: 8/10 must describe problem unprompted?

constraints: Minimum 20 interviews required for pattern saturation
8 out of 10 interviewees must describe the target problem unprompted before problem is considered validated
Never pitch your solution during problem interviews
All interviews must be recorded and transcribed
Interview-to-synthesis lag must not exceed 48 hours
Recruit from target ICP segments only

Needs to define ICP before interviewing
Needs strategic overview not execution steps
